ast.name: nodeValue
ast.source: How to alter props that already exist on notes.
ast.target: 如何修改笔记上已存在的属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine what to do when a property with the same name already exists in a file.  Note that incompatible types cannot be appended.(adding a number to a date)
ast.target: 当文件中已存在同名属性时，确定如何操作。请注意，不兼容的类型无法追加（例如，将数字添加到日期）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When toggled on, while looping through all files in a folder, you will also loop through any sub-folders.
ast.target: 开启后，在遍历文件夹中的所有文件时，也会遍历任何子文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set delimiter to use when creating a list.  Commas(,) are used by default.
ast.target: 设置创建列表时使用的分隔符。默认使用逗号(,)。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a file with properties that you want to load into the Multi Properties form by default.  Type in the full path of the desired file.(ex. Templates/PropFile 1)
ast.target: 选择一个包含您希望默认加载到“多属性”表单中的属性的文件。输入所需文件的完整路径（例如：Templates/PropFile 1）。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从所有标签页添加属性

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从所有标签页移除属性

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value
%cThe \`value\` property of a \`<select multiple>\` element should be an array, but it received a non-array value. The selection will be kept as is.
https://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value
ast.target: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\n%c`<select multiple>` 元素的 `value` 属性应为数组，但收到了一个非数组值。选择将保持原样。\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA \`<svelte:boundary>\` \`reset\` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在第一次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Delimiter must be a single character.
ast.target: 分隔符必须是单个字符。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please check at least one property to remove.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个要移除的属性。
